description_long: This is a single, medium-sized brown chicken egg with a smooth, slightly matte shell. The surface is mostly uniform in color, with subtle variations in brown tones and a few faint natural marks or spots. The egg has an oval, slightly asymmetrical shape, with one end more rounded and the other more tapered. The shell appears hard and unbroken, with a gentle sheen that catches light softly. There are no visible cracks, decorative patterns, or artificial markings. The overall appearance is natural and typical of a fresh, farm-sourced egg.
description: A smooth, medium-brown chicken egg with a hard, matte shell and subtle natural color variations.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from above, showing the wide, open curve of its shell and a gentle gradient of brown tones.
description_view_1: This view displays the more rounded end of the egg, highlighting its smooth, unblemished surface and a faint vertical mark.
description_view_2: The egg is shown from the side, emphasizing its oval profile and even brown coloration with a small spot near the base.
description_view_3: The tapered end of the egg is visible, with a slightly darker patch and a smooth, continuous shell surface.
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a meal preparation area or in a grocery setting. It may also be found in a carton with other eggs.
